description_long: This is a red Nintendo Game Boy Color handheld gaming console, featuring a rectangular plastic body with rounded edges. The front face displays a small, square LCD screen above a set of physical controls, including a D-pad, A and B buttons, and Start/Select buttons, all in black. The lower front section has a speaker grille, while the back reveals a battery compartment and a cartridge slot, currently holding a game cartridge. The sides show venting slits and a power switch, with additional ports and volume controls. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, intended for portable use and easy handheld operation.
description: A red Nintendo Game Boy Color handheld console with a screen, physical buttons, and a cartridge slot. Compact, plastic, and designed for portable gaming.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, D-pad, A/B buttons, Start/Select buttons, and speaker grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile, vent slits, and power switch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment, cartridge slot with cartridge inserted, and product label.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the volume dial and link cable port.
